task1.resume_text:
John Doe
SOFTWARE ENGINEER
666 999 0000 I xxx@my.centennialcollege.ca I Toronto, ON
PROFILE SUMMARY
A highly motivated Software Developer with a passion for solving complex problems and delivering impactful solutions. Excels at
adapting to challenges by leveraging strong analytical thinking, time management, and collaboration skills to create value and
achieve meaningful outcomes. A dedicated team player and quick learner with strong problem-solving abilities, system design
knowledge, and experience in software development and testing. Possesses strengths in data analytics, data visualization,
modeling, and reporting, with proficiency in SQL, Python, Machine Learning, and Java.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Backend Development: Java, Python, Node.js, C#, Flask
Frontend Development: React.js, Redux, Angular, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Tkinter
Database Management: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL
Machine Learning: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras
System Development: UML Diagrams, Object-Oriented Design, Agile Development
Tools: Figma, Lucidchart, Visio, Visual Paradigm, Jira, Git, Visual Studio Code, IntelliJ IDEA, SharePoint, Spyder
WORK EXPERIENCE
Healthcare Systems R&A Inc. (May. 2025 - Present)
Role: Software Engineer Research Assistant (AI)
Contributed to the development of machine learning models for chronic back pain and mineral exploration using
TensorFlow, Keras, and Neural Networks.
Assisted in automating the extraction of key points from images, converting them to JSON and then CSV for preprocessing.
Worked with the team to optimize model architecture, improving accuracy and performance.
Kaanchy - E-Commerce Web Application (Mar.2023 Oct.2024)
Role: UI developer, Inventory Manager, Customer Support
Designed and developed an e-commerce web application for selling ethnic clothing.
Implemented inventory management features to facilitate real-time stock updates and efficient order tracking.
Managed customer support operations, delivering prompt and personalized responses to address customer needs,
including effectively handling challenging situations and ensuring high satisfaction.
EDUCATION
Software Engineering Technology (Fast Track) Artificial Intelligence (Co-op) GPA: 4.45/4.5 (Sept. 2024-Present)
Centennial College, Toronto, ON
Expected Graduation: Dec. 2026
Software Engineering Technology (Fast Track) - Advanced Diploma - GPA: 4.38 / 4.5 (Jan. 2019 Aug. 2019)
Centennial College, Toronto, ON
Bachelor of Technology - Information Technology - GPA: 9.28 / 10 (Aug. 2012 June. 2016)
Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College (SMVEC), Puducherry, India
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
AI Project - Toronto Accident Prediction (Mar. 2025 Apr. 2025)
Role: UI Designer, UI Developer, AI Developer
Developed an SVM model and implemented ensemble techniques including hard and soft voting across five machine
learning models.
Handled preprocessing, feature engineering, and class imbalance.
Designed and developed a user interface for model analytics and comparative visualization.
Utilized tools and libraries such as Scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas, Seaborn, and Matplotlib.
AI Project - YouTube Spam Classifier (Dec. 2024 Dec. 2024)
Role: Project Coordinator, Developer
Led the development of a machine learning spam classifier for YouTube comments, improving detection accuracy by
15%.
Used scikit-learn, NumPy, Seaborn, and Matplotlib for data preprocessing, visualization, and model building.
Wrote and optimized Python code to handle large YouTube API datasets and conducted cross-validation for accuracy and
robustness.
BeatSnap - Social Media Web Application (Nov. 2024 Dec. 2024)
Role: UI Designer, UI Developer
Designed app wireframes in Figma, optimizing user experience and navigation.
Developed frontend with React, Redux, and styled with Bootstrap/CSS.
Overcame a challenging issue with iframe functionality, implementing a solution to control video playback, ensuring only
one video played at a time.
Integrated YouTube, Spotify and application APIs with the frontend to enable dynamic content and enhance user
interactions.
MindTrack Software System Design (Sep. 2024 - Dec. 2024)
Role: Project Coordinator, System Designer, System Analyst
Led design and development of MindTrack, a mobile app to improve time management and productivity.
Collaborated on defining system requirements, software architecture, and Agile development.
Used Lucidchart, Visio, Visual Paradigm, and Jira for system design, documentation, and project management.
HONORS & AWARDS
Academic Excellence Merit Award in Information Technology (Jan.2016)
For Securing 1st Rank at the College | SMVEC | Puducherry, India
State-Level 2nd Rank Holder in Information Technology (June. 2016)
Pondicherry University | Puducherry, India
COURSE WORK
Data Structures and Algorithms
Mobile App Development
Object Oriented Programming
Machine Learning & AI
Web Development
Linear Algebra and Statistics
Advanced Database Concepts
UI/UX Design
Leadership
PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT
Unsupervised Learning, Recommenders, Reinforcement Learning
May. 2025
Coursera (Remote) | Certificate
AI Product Foundations: Planning Strategies for Data Scientists
Feb. 2025
LinkedIn (Remote) | Certificate
Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification
Jan. 2025
Coursera (Remote) | Certificate
Advanced Learning Algorithms
Jan. 2025
Coursera (Remote) | Certificate
task1.job_description_text:
TD
TD
Machine Learning Engineer
Job Position
Machine Learning Engineer at TD
About the job
Work Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
Hours: 37.5
Line Of Business: Analytics, Insights, & Artificial Intelligence
Pay Details: $120,000 - $250,000 CAD
The pay details posted reflect a temporary market premium specific to this role that is
reassessed annually.
TD is committed to providing fair and equitable compensation opportunities to all
colleagues. Growth opportunities and skill development are defining features of the
colleague experience at TD. Our compensation policies and practices have been designed
to allow colleagues to progress through the salary range over time as they progress in their
role. The base pay actually offered may vary based upon the candidate's skills and
experience, job-related knowledge, geographic location, and other specific business and
organizational needs.
As a candidate, you are encouraged to ask compensation related questions and have an
open dialogue with your recruiter who can provide you more specific details for this role.
Job Description
We are currently seeking talented individuals for a variety of positions, ranging from
junior to senior levels, and will evaluate your application in its entirety.
Layer 6 is the AI center of excellence for TD Bank Group. We develop and deploy industryleading machine learning systems that impact the lives of over 27 million customers,
helping more people achieve their financial goals and needs.
Our work spans the field of machine learning with areas such as deep learning and
generative AI, time series forecasting and responsible use of AI. We have access to massive
financial datasets and actively collaborate with world renowned academic faculty. We are
driven to be at the cutting edge of machine learning in research, engineering, and impactful
applications.
We are looking for world-class engineers to tackle cutting-edge problems in Machine
Learning applied to the real world. Work with large-scale, real-world datasets spanning
multiple modalities, ranging from banking transactions, conversation transcripts to large
document collections.
As a Machine Learning Engineer, You Will
Join a world-class team of AI developers with an extensive track record of shipping
solutions at the cutting-edge
Architect scalable machine learning and Gen AI systems that integrate with existing
data platform and infrastructure, focusing on automation, operation efficiency, and
reliability
Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code for ML models to ensure efficient
deployment of scalable AI application
Work with large-scale, real-world datasets that range from banking transactions,
conversation histories, to large document collections
Grow by continuously learning new skills and exploring advanced topics in AI with a
team that thrives on knowledge-sharing
Required Qualifications
Master or bachelor's degree in computer science, Statistics, Mathematics,
Engineering or a related field
3+ years of developer experience shipping code in production settings
Strong background in machine learning and deep learning
Strong coding proficiency in Python, Java, C, or C++
You value good software design and sweat over details in code and API design
You take great personal pride in building robust and scalable software
You are highly accountable and have a strong sense of ownership
You strive to communicate clearly and with empathy
Preferred Qualifications
Research experience with publication record
Experience with LangGraph, Pytorch, Tensorflow, Jax, or comparable library
Experience with building and scaling data-intensive software
Experience using GPUs for accelerated deep learning training
Who We Are
TD is one of the world's leading global financial institutions and is the fifth largest bank in
North America by branches/stores. Every day, we deliver legendary customer experiences
to over 27 million households and businesses in Canada, the United States and around the
world. More than 95,000 TD colleagues bring their skills, talent, and creativity to the Bank,
those we serve, and the economies we support. We are guided by our vision to Be the
Better Bank and our purpose to enrich the lives of our customers, communities and
colleagues.
TD is deeply committed to being a leader in customer experience, that is why we believe
that all colleagues, no matter where they work, are customer facing. As we build our
business and deliver on our strategy, we are innovating to enhance the customer
experience and build capabilities to shape the future of banking. Whether you've got years
of banking experience or are just starting your career in financial services, we can help you
realize your potential. Through regular leadership and development conversations to
mentorship and training programs, we're here to support you towards your goals. As an
organization, we keep growing - and so will you.
Our Total Rewards Package
Our Total Rewards package reflects the investments we make in our colleagues to help
them and their families achieve their financial, physical, and mental well-being goals. Total
Rewards at TD includes a base salary, variable compensation, and several other key plans
such as health and well-being benefits, savings and retirement programs, paid time off,
banking benefits and discounts, career development, and reward and recognition
programs. Learn more
Additional Information
We're delighted that you're considering building a career with TD. Through regular
development conversations, training programs, and a competitive benefits plan, we're
committed to providing the support our colleagues need to thrive both at work and at
home.
Please be advised that this job opportunity is subject to provincial regulation for
employment purposes. It is imperative to acknowledge that each province or territory
within the jurisdiction of Canada may have its own set of regulations, requirements.
Colleague Development
If you're interested in a specific career path or are looking to build certain skills, we want to
help you succeed. You'll have regular career, development, and performance
conversations with your manager, as well as access to an online learning platform and a
variety of mentoring programs to help you unlock future opportunities. Whether you have a
passion for helping customers and want to expand your experience, or you want to coach
and inspire your colleagues, there are many different career paths within our organization
at TD - and we're committed to helping you identify opportunities that support your goals.
Training & Onboarding
We will provide training and onboarding sessions to ensure that you've got everything you
need to succeed in your new role.
Interview Process
We'll reach out to candidates of interest to schedule an interview. We do our best to
communicate outcomes to all applicants by email or phone call.
Accommodation
Your accessibility is important to us. Please let us know if you'd like accommodations
(including accessible meeting rooms, captioning for virtual interviews, etc.) to help us
remove barriers so that you can participate throughout the interview process.
We look forward to hearing from you!
Language Requirement (Quebec Only)
Sans Objet

Wrote and optimized Python code to handle large YouTube API datasets and conducted cross-validation for accuracy and
robustness.
BeatSnap - Social Media Web Application (Nov. 2024 Dec. 2024)
Role: UI Designer, UI Developer
Designed app wireframes in Figma, optimizing user experience and navigation.
Developed frontend with React, Redux, and styled with Bootstrap/CSS.
Overcame a challenging issue with iframe functionality, implementing a solution to control video playback, ensuring only
one video played at a time.
Integrated YouTube, Spotify and application APIs with the frontend to enable dynamic content and enhance user
interactions.
MindTrack Software System Design (Sep. 2024 - Dec. 2024)
Role: Project Coordinator, System Designer, System Analyst
Led design and development of MindTrack, a mobile app to improve time management and productivity.
Collaborated on defining system requirements, software architecture, and Agile development.
Used Lucidchart, Visio, Visual Paradigm, and Jira for system design, documentation, and project management.

job_description_output.raw_text:
TD
TD
Machine Learning Engineer
Job Position
Machine Learning Engineer at TD
About the job
Work Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
Hours: 37.5
Line Of Business: Analytics, Insights, & Artificial Intelligence
Pay Details: $120,000 - $250,000 CAD
The pay details posted reflect a temporary market premium specific to this role that is
reassessed annually.
TD is committed to providing fair and equitable compensation opportunities to all
colleagues. Growth opportunities and skill development are defining features of the
colleague experience at TD. Our compensation policies and practices have been designed
to allow colleagues to progress through the salary range over time as they progress in their
role. The base pay actually offered may vary based upon the candidate's skills and
experience, job-related knowledge, geographic location, and other specific business and
organizational needs.
As a candidate, you are encouraged to ask compensation related questions and have an
open dialogue with your recruiter who can provide you more specific details for this role.
Job Description
We are currently seeking talented individuals for a variety of positions, ranging from
junior to senior levels, and will evaluate your application in its entirety.
Layer 6 is the AI center of excellence for TD Bank Group. We develop and deploy industry-
leading machine learning systems that impact the lives of over 27 million customers,
helping more people achieve their financial goals and needs.
Our work spans the field of machine learning with areas such as deep learning and
generative AI, time series forecasting and responsible use of AI. We have access to massive
financial datasets and actively collaborate with world renowned academic faculty. We are
driven to be at the cutting edge of machine learning in research, engineering, and impactful
applications.
We are looking for world-class engineers to tackle cutting-edge problems in Machine
Learning applied to the real world. Work with large-scale, real-world datasets spanning
multiple modalities, ranging from banking transactions, conversation transcripts to large
document collections.
As a Machine Learning Engineer, You Will
Join a world-class team of AI developers with an extensive track record of shipping
solutions at the cutting-edge
Architect scalable machine learning and Gen AI systems that integrate with existing
data platform and infrastructure, focusing on automation, operation efficiency, and
reliability
Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code for ML models to ensure efficient
deployment of scalable AI application
Work with large-scale, real-world datasets that range from banking transactions,
conversation histories, to large document collections
Grow by continuously learning new skills and exploring advanced topics in AI with a
team that thrives on knowledge-sharing
Required Qualifications
Master or bachelor's degree in computer science, Statistics, Mathematics,
Engineering or a related field
3+ years of developer experience shipping code in production settings
Strong background in machine learning and deep learning
Strong coding proficiency in Python, Java, C, or C++
You value good software design and sweat over details in code and API design
You take great personal pride in building robust and scalable software
You are highly accountable and have a strong sense of ownership
You strive to communicate clearly and with empathy
Preferred Qualifications
Research experience with publication record
Experience with LangGraph, Pytorch, Tensorflow, Jax, or comparable library
Experience with building and scaling data-intensive software
Experience using GPUs for accelerated deep learning training
Who We Are
TD is one of the world's leading global financial institutions and is the fifth largest bank in
North America by branches/stores. Every day, we deliver legendary customer experiences
to over 27 million households and businesses in Canada, the United States and around the
world. More than 95,000 TD colleagues bring their skills, talent, and creativity to the Bank,
those we serve, and the economies we support. We are guided by our vision to Be the
Better Bank and our purpose to enrich the lives of our customers, communities and
colleagues.
TD is deeply committed to being a leader in customer experience, that is why we believe
that all colleagues, no matter where they work, are customer facing. As we build our
business and deliver on our strategy, we are innovating to enhance the customer
experience and build capabilities to shape the future of banking. Whether you've got years
of banking experience or are just starting your career in financial services, we can help you
realize your potential. Through regular leadership and development conversations to
mentorship and training programs, we're here to support you towards your goals. As an
organization, we keep growing - and so will you.
Our Total Rewards Package
Our Total Rewards package reflects the investments we make in our colleagues to help
them and their families achieve their financial, physical, and mental well-being goals. Total
Rewards at TD includes a base salary, variable compensation, and several other key plans
such as health and well-being benefits, savings and retirement programs, paid time off,
banking benefits and discounts, career development, and reward and recognition
programs. Learn more
Additional Information
We're delighted that you're considering building a career with TD. Through regular
development conversations, training programs, and a competitive benefits plan, we're
committed to providing the support our colleagues need to thrive both at work and at
home.
Please be advised that this job opportunity is subject to provincial regulation for
employment purposes. It is imperative to acknowledge that each province or territory
within the jurisdiction of Canada may have its own set of regulations, requirements.
Colleague Development
If you're interested in a specific career path or are looking to build certain skills, we want to
help you succeed. You'll have regular career, development, and performance
conversations with your manager, as well as access to an online learning platform and a
variety of mentoring programs to help you unlock future opportunities. Whether you have a
passion for helping customers and want to expand your experience, or you want to coach
and inspire your colleagues, there are many different career paths within our organization
at TD - and we're committed to helping you identify opportunities that support your goals.
Training & Onboarding
We will provide training and onboarding sessions to ensure that you've got everything you
need to succeed in your new role.
Interview Process
We'll reach out to candidates of interest to schedule an interview. We do our best to
communicate outcomes to all applicants by email or phone call.
Accommodation
Your accessibility is important to us. Please let us know if you'd like accommodations
(including accessible meeting rooms, captioning for virtual interviews, etc.) to help us
remove barriers so that you can participate throughout the interview process.
We look forward to hearing from you!
Language Requirement (Quebec Only)
Sans Objet

task2.resume_text:
John Doe
SOFTWARE ENGINEER
666 999 0000 I xxx@my.centennialcollege.ca I Toronto, ON
PROFILE SUMMARY
A highly motivated Software Developer with a passion for solving complex problems and delivering impactful solutions. Excels at
adapting to challenges by leveraging strong analytical thinking, time management, and collaboration skills to create value and
achieve meaningful outcomes. A dedicated team player and quick learner with strong problem-solving abilities, system design
knowledge, and experience in software development and testing. Possesses strengths in data analytics, data visualization,
modeling, and reporting, with proficiency in SQL, Python, Machine Learning, and Java.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Backend Development: Java, Python, Node.js, C#, Flask
Frontend Development: React.js, Redux, Angular, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Tkinter
Database Management: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL
Machine Learning: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras
System Development: UML Diagrams, Object-Oriented Design, Agile Development
Tools: Figma, Lucidchart, Visio, Visual Paradigm, Jira, Git, Visual Studio Code, IntelliJ IDEA, SharePoint, Spyder
WORK EXPERIENCE
Healthcare Systems R&A Inc. (May. 2025 - Present)
Role: Software Engineer Research Assistant (AI)
Contributed to the development of machine learning models for chronic back pain and mineral exploration using
TensorFlow, Keras, and Neural Networks.
Assisted in automating the extraction of key points from images, converting them to JSON and then CSV for preprocessing.
Worked with the team to optimize model architecture, improving accuracy and performance.
Kaanchy - E-Commerce Web Application (Mar.2023 Oct.2024)
Role: UI developer, Inventory Manager, Customer Support
Designed and developed an e-commerce web application for selling ethnic clothing.
Implemented inventory management features to facilitate real-time stock updates and efficient order tracking.
Managed customer support operations, delivering prompt and personalized responses to address customer needs,
including effectively handling challenging situations and ensuring high satisfaction.
EDUCATION
Software Engineering Technology (Fast Track) Artificial Intelligence (Co-op) GPA: 4.45/4.5 (Sept. 2024-Present)
Centennial College, Toronto, ON
Expected Graduation: Dec. 2026
Software Engineering Technology (Fast Track) - Advanced Diploma - GPA: 4.38 / 4.5 (Jan. 2019 Aug. 2019)
Centennial College, Toronto, ON
Bachelor of Technology - Information Technology - GPA: 9.28 / 10 (Aug. 2012 June. 2016)
Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College (SMVEC), Puducherry, India
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
AI Project - Toronto Accident Prediction (Mar. 2025 Apr. 2025)
Role: UI Designer, UI Developer, AI Developer
Developed an SVM model and implemented ensemble techniques including hard and soft voting across five machine
learning models.
Handled preprocessing, feature engineering, and class imbalance.
Designed and developed a user interface for model analytics and comparative visualization.
Utilized tools and libraries such as Scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas, Seaborn, and Matplotlib.
AI Project - YouTube Spam Classifier (Dec. 2024 Dec. 2024)
Role: Project Coordinator, Developer
Led the development of a machine learning spam classifier for YouTube comments, improving detection accuracy by
15%.
Used scikit-learn, NumPy, Seaborn, and Matplotlib for data preprocessing, visualization, and model building.
Wrote and optimized Python code to handle large YouTube API datasets and conducted cross-validation for accuracy and
robustness.
BeatSnap - Social Media Web Application (Nov. 2024 Dec. 2024)
Role: UI Designer, UI Developer
Designed app wireframes in Figma, optimizing user experience and navigation.
Developed frontend with React, Redux, and styled with Bootstrap/CSS.
Overcame a challenging issue with iframe functionality, implementing a solution to control video playback, ensuring only
one video played at a time.
Integrated YouTube, Spotify and application APIs with the frontend to enable dynamic content and enhance user
interactions.
MindTrack Software System Design (Sep. 2024 - Dec. 2024)
Role: Project Coordinator, System Designer, System Analyst
Led design and development of MindTrack, a mobile app to improve time management and productivity.
Collaborated on defining system requirements, software architecture, and Agile development.
Used Lucidchart, Visio, Visual Paradigm, and Jira for system design, documentation, and project management.
HONORS & AWARDS
Academic Excellence Merit Award in Information Technology (Jan.2016)
For Securing 1st Rank at the College | SMVEC | Puducherry, India
State-Level 2nd Rank Holder in Information Technology (June. 2016)
Pondicherry University | Puducherry, India
COURSE WORK
Data Structures and Algorithms
Mobile App Development
Object Oriented Programming
Machine Learning & AI
Web Development
Linear Algebra and Statistics
Advanced Database Concepts
UI/UX Design
Leadership
PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT
Unsupervised Learning, Recommenders, Reinforcement Learning
May. 2025
Coursera (Remote) | Certificate
AI Product Foundations: Planning Strategies for Data Scientists
Feb. 2025
LinkedIn (Remote) | Certificate
Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification

Coursera (Remote) | Certificate
